theme.strategy: The Art Gallery - The UI is the frame, the product is the art. Massive whitespace, large typography.

headings.usage: All section titles, hero text, product names on detail page. Use 'tracking-tight' for large sizes.

body.usage: Descriptions, prices, buttons, navigation. Use 'tracking-wide' for uppercase labels.

usage_rules.buttons: bg-black text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black hover:border-black border border-transparent transition-all duration-300

strategies.home_hero: Full-screen immersive image/video. Centered typography. Minimal overlay.
strategies.bento_grid: Use for categories. Asymmetric layout (1 large, 2 small, 1 tall).
strategies.product_list: Clean grid. 1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 4 col desktop. Minimal product cards.
strategies.product_detail: Split screen. Left: Sticky image gallery (vertical scroll). Right: Sticky product details.

buttons.style: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or minimal radius (rounded-sm). Uppercase text. Wide tracking.

variants.secondary: bg-transparent border border-black text-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white

cards.product: No border, no shadow by default. Image aspect ratio 3:4. Hover: Image zoom or secondary image reveal. Text aligned left below image.
cards.category: Text overlay on image. Dark gradient at bottom for readability.

inputs.style: Minimal. Border-b only (underline style) or clean box with light border. Focus: Black border.

guidelines.scroll_reveal: Elements fade in as they enter viewport.
guidelines.hover_effects: Smooth scale (1.05) for images. Underline expansion for links.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #000000 on #FFFFFF or #FFFFFF on #000000.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Stick to solid white or very subtle off-white.
Avoid 'tech' blues or purples. Use monochrome + beige/earth tones.
Images are the heroes. Give them maximum space.
Typography must be hierarchical. Huge headings, readable body.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium fashion e-commerce site. Think 'Vogue' meets 'Shopify'. Prioritize visual impact and smoothness. Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections. Implement the 'Bento' grid for categories on the homepage. Use the 'Playfair Display' font for all headings to give it that luxury feel.
